scope.summary: R4 adds a rig report lane that emits punch-list findings and mechanically gates refusal-corpus drift against a committed baseline.
out_of_scope: Changing dispatcher refusal categories or the served refusal-corpus writer.
Producing a field/customer report from live artifacts; this close proves the local synthetic report/gate scaffold.
Running the full workspace gate in the shared checkout.

entry_points.name: bash -n scripts/rig/rig.sh scripts/rig/rig_report.sh && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m py_compile scripts/rig/refusal_corpus_gate.py
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22. The rig entrypoint and report script parse, and the refusal-corpus diff helper compiles.

entry_points.name: bash scripts/rig/rig_report.sh run --dry-run --log
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22. The dry run scheduled the committed baseline and seeded drift candidate without generating report artifacts.

entry_points.name: bash scripts/rig/rig.sh report --dry-run --log
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22 after the report delegation was fixed to forward --dry-run and --log into scripts/rig/rig_report.sh.

entry_points.name: env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR scripts/swarm_discipline.sh bounded-run --timeout 300 -- bash scripts/rig/rig_report.sh run --log
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22 at source f8211f4175b8bf149571ca2180214e5a0c8db5a5. The seeded refusal diff emitted two findings in punch-list shape: one P1 category change and one P0 newly allowed construct; sensitive_scan_hits was empty.

entry_points.name: env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR scripts/swarm_discipline.sh bounded-run --timeout 300 -- bash scripts/rig/rig.sh report --log
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22 at source f8211f4175b8bf149571ca2180214e5a0c8db5a5. The existing rig report entrypoint emitted findings.jsonl, findings.md, and summary.json through the new R4 report lane.

entry_points.name: tests/artifacts/evidence/r4-report-refusal-gate.json
entry_points.trace: Durable proof records source f8211f4175b8bf149571ca2180214e5a0c8db5a5, direct and integrated report artifact paths, finding_count=2, category_changed_count=1, newly_allowed_count=1, sensitive_scan_hits=[], and synthetic_only=true.

limitations: The committed baseline is synthetic and minimal. It proves the R4 report/diff mechanics and seeded drift detection, not exhaustive live refusal corpus coverage.
A real exported refusal corpus can be supplied to scripts/rig/rig_report.sh with --candidate; this close does not claim a live field export.
The full workspace gate was not run because this shared checkout has unrelated in-flight pane changes.
